design_plan: rng=42; hero_math: max-width 1120px -> 2–3 lines; AIDA: Attention(hero), Interest(bento workflows), Desire(compare + cache), Action(CTAs); bento_density: grid-auto-flow dense verified; label_sweep: competitors all mentioned; button_contrast: black/white pills AA+
headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page showing how ecommerce operators can use Super’s personal AI agents to monitor orders, handle support backlogs, and eliminate repetitive admin by operating real software and reusing a computer‑use cache. The page is grounded in current evidence about computer‑use agents (notably Gemini 3.5 Flash) and contrasts Super with ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids as market context.
